subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Abhá Beauty! Though in the wilderness of separation thou didst kindle the fire of yearning and cherish the desire for the Threshold of Light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی هر چند در صحرای فراق آتش اشتیاق برافروختی و آرزوی عتبه نیر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @role and station of women, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action
